title: Dungeons And Dragons
description: Discover unique legendary magic weapons, armour and artifacts inspired by Dungeons and Dragons lore.
body:
### **MAJOR UPDATE!**
  
**FIRST MAJOR BOSS ADDED AND MUCH MORE**
                                
                                
The D&D Mod is a Vanilla+ fantasy expansion for Minecraft, introducing powerful gear, enchanted artifacts, new biomes, dimensions, and lore-inspired adventures — all while staying true to the spirit of Minecraft’s core gameplay.

The D&D Mod reimagines Minecraft as a land rich in forgotten magic, ancient metals, and legendary artifacts drawn from the worlds of D&D.

Currently there isn't many dungeons or dragons yet but! this will soon be fixed!
Check out the Dungeons and Dragons Mod Wiki to help with recipes and unlocking the legendary items!

![The Feywild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df277bbc900257a4d0f91c5033c689e5291d2a15.png)
**The Feywild**

The Feywild shimmers with untamed magic, where vibrant Blessed Forests stretch beneath blue-green skies, Cursed Forests bleed with twisted red trees and clinging webs, and the surreal hues of Voidbloom Forests blur the line between dream and reality.


![Shadowfell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6399f537af4dbb1df1653c8489d18bba0b5c64e9.png)
**The Shadowfell**

Cloaked in mist and silence, the Shadowfell is a dying world of crumbling ruins, barren lands, and forgotten memories, where the light barely touches the ground and the air itself feels heavy with ancient sorrow.

![The Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f941ae4196acd16344711d38d273242c4cb5c5.png)      
Forge Mythical Gear
Mythril, Adamantium, Aurelia, and Dragon Silver introduce new tiers of progression beyond Netherite, each with unique traits and the ability to be infused with Netherite to unlock even greater power.


![angel Reaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b71d2c6ca494eade289457348dccc6f0122f1896.png)
Wield Legendary Relics
Unleash Artifacts like the Vorpal Sword, which has a chance to decapitate foes, or the Angel Reaper, a weapon that steals the souls of its victims. Equip the Blightstar Bow to fire enchanted arrows, Flame Tongue to burn enemies, or the Oathbow to mark your target for a deadly pursuit.


![orb of scrying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27851955956c0f744bb38445c5d94caa55b045bb.png)
Arcane Crafting
The magic of The D&D Mod extends beyond traditional weaponry, introducing a system of Essence extracted from slain creatures. This mystical essence is the key to forging and repairing magic weapons and artifacts, ensuring that your most powerful equipement remain intact and battle-ready. 

Immersive Music & More
Enhance your journey with potion effect granting custom music discs found throughout the world, featuring original compositions by Moxie.

Future Work
The Hidden Depths of the Nether
Legends tell of a forgotten layer beneath the Nether, a place so shrouded in mystery that even Piglins dare not speak of it. Some claim it is the true source of the world’s darkest magic, while others believe it to be a graveyard of fallen gods, a realm untouched by hands. What lies within? Secrets, treasures, or perhaps an ancient evil waiting to awaken?
The Raw Power of Dragon Silver
Dragon Silver, a metal infused with raw strength and supernatural resilience, grants its wearer enhanced brawn and heightened reflexes, making them an unstoppable force in battle. Those who don a full set of this armor feel an unnatural surge of Strength and Haste, as if driven by something beyond their own will.

Yet, no one knows the true source of its power. The Ŋ͟ⱨï̷ɢh̴Ⱶϯø͞ⱨⱥ̶Ⱦϸɇ͟Ɽ name is whispered in fear, a being whose influence lingers upon those who wear the armor. Some believe Dragon Silver is a blessing of the ancients, but others warn that it carries a darker cost, a pact unknowingly made, waiting to be fulfilled. The deeper one delves into its secrets, the harder it becomes to ignore the feeling that something… or someone… is watching.

NEXT UPDATE!

The next mod update will implement more legendary gear! Comment what dungeons and dragons magic item you would like to see next!
